caption: A person in a black shirt stands at a podium in a lecture hall, presenting to an audience seated in rows of chairs. A large projection screen displays a white slide with text, and a long table with water glasses and laptops sits before the speaker. The audience consists of several people, including a man in a yellow shirt and another wearing a dark grey t-shirt with white text and a logo that reads "I SURVIVED THE WAR...". As the sequence progresses, the speaker remains at the podium while another individual in a black shirt enters from the right. Eventually, the first speaker steps away from the podium, and a man in a blue shirt and khaki pants approaches the front. A woman in a brown top and black skirt is also seen walking toward the right side of the room.
